name: Crib Bedding Set - Blue - 4pc - Cloud Island™
description:
This 4-Piece Crib Bedding Set from cloud Island™ is suitable for standard cribs and toddler beds. This bedding set includes two crib sheets with blue polka dots on a white background on one and blue stripes against a white backdrop on the other. Also included are a channel-stitched quilt in solid blue and a white crib bedskirt with a 14-inch drop length. All pieces are made of 100% cotton and are machine washable for added convenience.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
